title: Vedic Heritage Portal
description: Government of India portal preserving Vedic texts, recitations, and manuscripts.

title: Gita Supersite (IIT Kanpur)
description: Bhagavad Gita portal with multiple commentaries and translations.

title: SanskritDocuments.org
description: Large repository of Sanskrit texts across scriptures and stotras.

title: Rigveda UTF-8 (Detlef Eichler)
description: Complete Rigveda text in UTF-8 format.

title: Sacred Texts Archive (Hinduism)
description: Public domain English translations of major Hindu scriptures.

title: VedaWeb
description: Academic linguistic platform focused on the Rigveda.

title: VedaWeb Data
description: Open research datasets supporting the VedaWeb project.

title: 4 Vedas Dataset (Kaggle)
description: Text dataset containing the four Vedas.

title: Valmiki Ramayana
description: Sanskrit and English presentation of the Valmiki Ramayana.

title: Valmiki Ramayana Dataset
description: Structured dataset derived from the Valmiki Ramayana.

title: Bhagavad Gita GitHub Dataset
description: Machine-readable Bhagavad Gita data and API resources.

title: GRETIL e-text Archive
description: Academic archive of Sanskrit and Indic texts.

title: Indology Virtual Archive
description: Curated directory of Indic e-text collections.

title: Shaiva E-texts (Hamburg University)
description: Academic collection of Shaiva and Tantric texts.

title: DharmicData Repository
description: Collection of datasets related to Dharmic scriptures.

title: Vedanta Datasets
description: Datasets focused on Vedanta and Yoga texts.

title: Oliver Hellwig Sanskrit Corpus
description: Computational Sanskrit corpus and tools for research.

title: Kyoto Sanskrit Resources
description: Sanskrit linguistic tools and digital resources from Kyoto University.

title: Rigveda Audio Archive
description: Audio recordings of Rigveda recitations.

title: Ayurveda Text Dataset
description: English Ayurveda text dataset.

title: Jagannatha Hora
description: Free Vedic astrology software for chart calculations.

title: PyJHora
description: Python implementation of Vedic astrology calculations.

title: VedAstro
description: Open-source Vedic astrology APIs and libraries.

title: Veducation Library
description: Online library of Hindu scriptures and books.

title: OS.me
description: Spiritual writing and knowledge platform.

title: Sadhana App
description: Modern digital platform for guided spiritual practices.

title: Om Swami YouTube Channel
description: Video lectures and discussions on Sanatan Dharma topics.

title: Vedanta Society of New York
description: Video content related to Hindu philosophy and teachings.

title: SARIT - Search and Retrieval of Indic Texts
description: Digital corpus of Sanskrit and Prakrit texts for scholarly study and search.

title: Muktabodha Digital Library
description: Digital collection of rare Sanskrit manuscripts with emphasis on Tantra and Shaiva traditions.

title: Wisdom Library
description: Extensive collection of books, articles, dictionaries, and hymns on Hinduism and Sanskrit.

title: Gita Press
description: World's largest publisher of Hindu religious texts offering online authentic e-books.

title: Patanjali Yoga Sutras
description: Comprehensive resource for the Yoga Sutras of Patanjali with translations and commentary.

title: Global Grey Ebooks (Hinduism)
description: Collection of public domain English translations of Hindu texts.

title: Ved Puran Archive
description: Free Hindi PDFs of Vedas and Puranas.

title: SHDVEF Scriptural Library
description: Digital library of various Hindu religious scriptures.

title: Sanskrit eBooks
description: Downloadable PDFs of Sanskrit texts and translations.

title: Patanjali Yoga Sutras (IGS)
description: Patanjali Yoga Sutras PDF with Sanskrit text and English translation from the International Gita Society.

title: BBT Media Art Gallery
description: Official repository for devotional paintings and art work, featuring spiritual imagery and illustrations from Vedic scriptures.

title: Greatest Verses Of The Vedas
description: Audio compilation of significant verses from the Vedas.

title: The Ghanapati
description: YouTube Music channel featuring high-quality Vedic recitations and chants.

title: The Sanskrit Channel
description: Educational YouTube channel dedicated to Sanskrit language, literature, and Vedic wisdom.

title: Cologne Digital Sanskrit Dictionaries
description: The most comprehensive academic compilation of digitized Sanskrit dictionaries (including Monier-Williams and Apte) essential for translating scriptures.

title: Srimad Bhagavatam Online
description: A beautifully formatted, independent digital presentation of the Srimad Bhagavatam with Sanskrit, Roman transliteration, synonyms, and translation.

title: Stotra Nidhi
description: A meticulously proofread and formatted collection of thousands of Hindu stotras and mantras available in multiple Indian regional scripts.

title: Sanskrit Texts and Stotras
description: Downloadable PDFs of core Sanskrit texts, stotras, Vedic selections, Upanishads, Bhagavad Gita, and sahasranamas (with some translations/transliterations); includes audio recordings of Vedic pundits reciting Rig/Sama Veda, Upanishads, and Gita.

title: Ambuda
description: A Sanskrit library featuring Sanskrit texts with word-by-word analysis, integrated dictionary support, and digital tools.

title: Bodleian Sanskrit Manuscripts (Clay Collection)
description: Digital archive of rare and significant Sanskrit manuscripts from the Bodleian Libraries, University of Oxford.

title: Advaita Vedanta Archive
description: Collection of Advaita Vedanta texts including works of Shankaracharya and other Vedantic scholars.

title: Dharmic Scriptures
description: Structured directory of Hindu scriptures including Vedas, Upanishads, Puranas, and Vedanta texts.

title: Hindu Online Scriptural Library
description: Digital library providing categorized access to Vedas, Vedangas, Upanishads, and philosophical texts.

title: Cambridge Sanskrit Manuscripts
description: A full catalogue and digital archive of the Sanskrit manuscripts held by Cambridge Digital Library.

title: Soundarya Lahari
description: Soundarya Lahari PDF by Sri Adi Shankara Stutis.

title: Tantra Sadhana App
description: Tantra Sadhana app from Om Swami and the Vedic Sadhana Foundation team, offering guided practices.

title: DharmaWiki
description: Community-edited educational wiki covering Hindu Sanatan Dharma — temples, philosophy, rituals, texts, and traditions with articles in English and Hindi.
